session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.5.0: Mon Apr 27 20:38:56 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: Standing on the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night can evoke an array of powerful emotions and sensations. The cool night air envelops your body as you take in the expansive horizon stretching endlessly before you. The darkness seems to stretch beyond what your eyes can see, creating a sense of isolation and mystery that is both calming and unsettling. The gentle lapping of waves against the shore might provide some solace, but the vastness of the ocean remains unyielding, leaving one feeling small in comparison yet also empowered by the grandeur of nature's power. The stars twinkle above you, casting their light upon your reflection on the water, creating a surreal and almost otherworldly experience. The silence is broken only occasionally by the sound of waves or seabirds, adding to the peaceful but slightly eerie atmosphere that fills this intimate moment with both beauty and solitude.
